cross_cutting_concerns.description: All 54 blog posts import Breadcrumb from '@/components/Breadcrumb' which is a non-functional stub that renders hidden <span> elements instead of clickable links. The breadcrumb links (Home → /, Blog → /blog) are not rendered as navigable elements. There is a working SiteBreadcrumbs component available at @/components/SiteBreadcrumbs.tsx that should be used instead.
No blog posts use images ( or Next.js ). All 54 posts are text-only. Consider adding relevant images/illustrations for improved engagement and SEO.
